metadata.scope: Public source tree, installable skill, deterministic scripts, synthetic tests, CI workflow, and v0.1.0 release artifacts

evidence: SKILL.md prohibits unauthorized tool installation, external probing, production-data access, exploit-oriented testing, and automatic remediation.
detect_security_profiles.py reads bounded file metadata/text and reports execution_performed=false; it contains no target-code execution or network client.
.github/workflows/validate.yml sets permissions.contents=read, uses no secrets, pull_request_target, or self-hosted runner, and pins checkout to a full commit SHA.

coverage.method: Repeat deterministic build and artifact inspection
evidence: Two v0.1.0 builds were byte-for-byte identical and emitted a ZIP, SHA256SUMS, and CycloneDX 1.6 JSON SBOM with file hashes.
The bundle test inspected 66 files for private paths, unpublished project identities, common secret formats, symlinks, and files over 1 MiB; no release-blocking match was found.

coverage.method: Checksum-verified Gitleaks v8.30.1 full-history and working-tree scans with 100% result redaction
evidence: The Gitleaks v8.30.1 macOS ARM64 archive and publisher checksum file matched the SHA-256 digests published with the official release.

Gitleaks scanned all four commits reachable from the clean repository and the current working tree at revision 1cc87c6fd8c9ae1bb351c0a50ebe58c6a33be619; both scans completed successfully and reported zero potential secrets. Pattern-based scanning does not prove absence of all secrets.
Validate run 29302004890 completed successfully on commit 55bfa8bd6d667fcac0036d7743cdc229f384118e; CodeQL setup run 29302092949 completed successfully for Python and GitHub Actions.

Private vulnerability reporting, dependency graph, Dependabot alerts/security/grouped updates, malware alerts, CodeQL, secret scanning, and push protection were enabled and observed on the recreated public repository.

Active ruleset 18904743 targets the default branch and requires pull requests, linear history, current branches, resolved conversations, deterministic-validation, and CodeQL results at High-or-higher security and Errors standard thresholds; deletion and force-push are blocked; repository administrators retain an always-allow emergency bypass.

coverage.method: Published release page and GitHub API observation
evidence: Release v0.1.0 is published as latest and immutable, points to verified commit 1cc87c6fd8c9ae1bb351c0a50ebe58c6a33be619, and contains the four intended project-supplied assets.
GitHub-reported SHA-256 digests for the ZIP, SHA256SUMS, CycloneDX SBOM, and JSON security ledger matched the locally generated files.

release.rationale: No confirmed Critical or High findings were identified. Deterministic validation, hosted validation, CodeQL, repository security controls, protected-main gates, checksum-verified external secret scanning, and immutable release verification passed. Pattern-based secret scanning does not prove absence of every possible secret.
